tasks.title: F1: zero allowed-failure list -- KB test isolation + TZ-independent time tests
tasks.notes: Graph-neighbor block spies process.cwd() to empty temp dir so cold-seed cannot read the real .fleet/kb-canonical.json (root cause KB c5a129ed). time-utils: forced Asia/Tokyo via vi.stubEnv for the 2 sub-hour-sensitive assertions. Isolation proven (renamed real bible away, 39/39 pass). No literal allowlist existed in config; it was the 6 known-flaky tests, now green. Full suite 1995 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail.

tasks.title: F3: relocate general clamp into provider.capture choke point
tasks.notes: R3 DUPLICATE: enforcement clamp added in SqliteProvider.capture() after the directive gate; handler clamp kept for confidence_clamped UX flag. Seam commented for T2.1 import mode (internal 2nd param, unreachable from 1-arg HTTP route). Fail-then-pass provider test in kb-capture-gate.test.ts (red 'expected CONFIRMED to be INFERRED' pre-change). R5 fallout migrated to capture-then-promote in kb-decay/kb-promote/kb-feedback/kb-claims-proof/kb-token-and-learning. 1998 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail.

tasks.title: F2: bidirectional staleness -- hardened predicate + freshnessSweep
tasks.notes: Shared freshnessRevivable() predicate (4 non-hash conjuncts) + basisFullyMatches() + parseBasis(), reused by checkFreshness (now bidirectional) and freshnessSweep(). Marker anchored to FEEDBACK_MARKER_RE=/\n\n\[feedback \d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}T/. freshnessSweep returns {checked,staled,unstaled}; checked excludes empty/malformed basis. MCP tool kb_freshness_sweep registered. 8 test groups (core red 'freshnessSweep is not a function' pre-change; superseded/feedback/marker/invalidated/partial exclusions; empty-basis; shape). KB capture 5edfa184. 2006 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 1 (zero failures)
tasks.notes: npm run build clean (tsc). npm test 2006 passed / 14 skipped / 0 failed -- allowed-failure list gone. npx gitnexus analyze OK (4433 nodes/12174 edges, 41s); git checkout -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md run immediately after (no tracked doc drift). Pushed feat/code-intelligence-abstraction. STOP after T1.4 per dispatch.

tasks.title: F4: kb_import -- trusted channel, directive quarantine, source normalization, idempotency
tasks.notes: New src/tools/kb-import.ts + provider support. CaptureSource gains 'import'. capture() gets a 2nd param CaptureOpts {importMode,preferredId} (SqliteProvider only -- HTTP does capture(JSON.parse(body)) one-arg, MCP handler builds input from zod, so unreachable: R4 airtight). Order in capture(): directive gate -> provenance normalization (MEDIUM-4: !importMode && source in {import,promotion} -> 'unknown') -> clamp (gated on !importMode for non-directive). New public hasEntry(id) for LOW-2 id-skip FIRST (checks ALL rows, no use_count bump). preferredId used only on pure 'add'; AUDN update/flagged always mint fresh uuid. kb-import: resolveRepoPath (explicit>cwd>throw, mirrors kb-export), validates bible parses to array, per-entry: skip malformed, id-skip, capture(importMode+preferredId), then freshnessSweep. LOW-1 sweep anchoring: chdir to resolved repo for sweep, restore in finally (documented; absolute basis paths cwd-independent). Deterministic content synth from summary. Report {imported,skipped,superseded,flagged,sweep:{checked,staled,unstaled}}. kb_import registered in index.ts with trust-boundary description. 10 test groups all green incl R4 unreachability (test 7 forged import+promotion both clamped+source-scrubbed), directive-quarantine (test 2 UNVERIFIED+flagged+directive:pending, not in default retrieval), idempotency (test 3 symbol-less/file-less proves id-skip carries it). Full suite 2016 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail. NOTE (deviation): post-import sweep stales PRE-EXISTING wrong-branch entries whose files the merge changed, not freshly-imported ones -- capture recomputes basis=current so a fresh import with an existing file is fresh by construction (bible carries no hashes to preserve); test 6 documents + proves this.

tasks.title: F4 CLI: apra-fleet kb import wiring
tasks.notes: New src/cli/kb-import.ts (parseKbImportArgs, kbImportCmd(importFn,args), runKbImport) mirroring kb-commit.ts; thin wrapper over the same kbImport tool (no logic dup). Wired subCmd==='import' into src/index.ts kb argv dispatch. Prints 'Imported N, skipped..' + 'Freshness sweep: checked..' in plain ASCII; exit 1 on resolution failure. KB_IMPORT_USAGE + --path help carry the caller-asserted-trust line (LOW-1). 10 handler+smoke tests (parse, usage trust line, success/error exit codes, malformed JSON, real kbImport happy+missing-bible). End-to-end smoke: node dist/index.js kb import --repo <tmp> exits 1 'bible file not found' before touching the KB. Build clean; CLI tests green.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: npm run build clean (tsc). npm test 2026 passed / 14 skipped / 0 failed -- zero-failure criterion holds. npx gitnexus analyze OK (4470 nodes/12271 edges, 41.2s); git checkout -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md run immediately after (no tracked doc drift). Pushed feat/code-intelligence-abstraction. STOP after T2.3 per dispatch.
